title: Logs Explorer
description: Explore and analyze log volume, error patterns, and search across all services

panels.title: Log Volume by Service
panels.query: SELECT service.name, count(*) as log_count FROM "python-worker-logs" WHERE timestamp > now() - 1h GROUP BY service.name ORDER BY log_count DESC

panels.title: Log Volume by Level
panels.query: SELECT level, count(*) as log_count FROM "python-worker-logs" WHERE timestamp > now() - 1h GROUP BY level ORDER BY log_count DESC

panels.title: Error Logs Timeline
panels.query: SELECT rate(count(*), 5m) as error_rate FROM "python-worker-logs" WHERE level = 'error' AND timestamp > now() - 6h

panels.title: Log Search
panels.query: SELECT timestamp, level, service.name, message FROM "python-worker-logs" WHERE timestamp > now() - 1h ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Top Error Messages
panels.query: SELECT message, count(*) as occurrence_count, max(timestamp) as last_seen FROM "python-worker-logs" WHERE level = 'error' AND timestamp > now() - 24h GROUP BY message ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC LIMIT 20
